# Invoicelet

> Free, private online invoice generator. No sign-up, no server, no data stored. Create and download professional PDF invoices instantly.

## About

Invoicelet is a browser-based invoice generator at https://invoicelet.com. It runs entirely client-side — no data is sent to any server. Invoices and saved versions are stored locally in the browser using localStorage.

## Features

- Instant PDF export (one-click download)
- 18+ currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, INR, GEL, and more)
- 16 languages (English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Chinese, Arabic, and more)
- Customizable tax rates with automatic calculation
- Version history — save, name, search, and restore invoices
- Multiple professionally designed invoice style themes
- Fully editable — click any field to customize
- Mobile-optimized responsive design
- 100% private — no data leaves the browser
- No sign-up or account required
- Works offline once loaded

## How It Works

1. Open https://invoicelet.com
2. Fill in company name, address, and client details, in place
3. Add line items with descriptions, quantities, and prices
4. Choose currency and language
5. Click the PDF button to download

## Technical Details

- Single-page HTML/CSS/JS application
- Client-side PDF generation via html2pdf.js
- localStorage for autosave and version management
- Google Fonts: DM Sans, Playfair Display
- Hosted on GitHub Pages

## Links

- Website: https://invoicelet.com
- Repository: https://github.com/bumbeishvili/invoicelet.com
